title: Add scheduled snapshotter for risk-model feature store
author: sasha.pereira
head: sasha/feature-snapshot
description: Cron-driven snapshot of the live feature store to S3. Used by RISK-1102's offline backtests. Runs nightly. Logs per-table row counts.

planted_bug.summary: The S3 client and the DB cursor are opened but never closed. Under the every-night cadence the process leaks N file descriptors per table per run. Will OOM the snapshotter host within a quarter.

files.diff:
+import csv
+from pathlib import Path
+
+import boto3
+
+from risk.feature_store import db_pool
+
+TABLES = ["members", "plans", "delinquencies", "signups"]
+BUCKET = "feature-store-snapshots"
+
+
+def snapshot_nightly() -> None:
+    s3 = boto3.client("s3")
+    for table in TABLES:
+        cursor = db_pool.cursor()
+        cursor.execute(f"SELECT * FROM {table}")
+        rows = cursor.fetchall()
+        path = Path(f"/tmp/{table}.csv")
+        with path.open("w") as f:
+            writer = csv.writer(f)
+            writer.writerows(rows)
+        s3.upload_file(str(path), BUCKET, f"snapshots/{table}.csv")
+        print(f"snapshotted {table}: {len(rows)} rows")
